markdown:
Mountaineers usually travel solo, but some guide expeditions into dangerous terrain. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 20 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 15 [Mountaineer](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3473) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 55 **Perception** +15 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Petran](/Languages.aspx?ID=109), [Pyric](/Languages.aspx?ID=110) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +13, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +13, [Mountain Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +15, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +12, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +12 **Str** +4 **Dex** +3 **Con** +2 **Int** +0 **Wis** +3 **Cha** +0 **Experienced Steps** A mountaineer isn't impeded by [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453) caused by snow or ice. They gain a +2 circumstance bonus to [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) checks to [Balance](/Actions.aspx?ID=2369) on slippery ice.
**Professional Climber** While climbing, the mountaineer can have up to five allies [Following the Expert](/Actions.aspx?ID=2625) and grants a +3 circumstance bonus to [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) checks to [Climb](/Actions.aspx?ID=2374). **Items** [Chalk](/Equipment.aspx?ID=12) (10), [extreme climbing kit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=14), [Compass](/Equipment.aspx?ID=16), [Hatchet](/Weapons.aspx?ID=27) (2), [Hide Armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=7), [Pick](/Weapons.aspx?ID=34), [Spyglass](/Equipment.aspx?ID=54), [Survey Map](/Equipment.aspx?ID=65) --- **AC** 21 **Fort** +14 **Ref** +12 **Will** +9 **HP** 80 **Lost My Footing** **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** The mountaineer critically fails a check to [Balance](/Actions.aspx?ID=2369) or [Climb](/Actions.aspx?ID=2374); **Effect** Training kicks in, and the mountaineer catches themself, improving the check from a critical failure to a failure.
**Tuck and Roll** During an [avalanche](/Rules.aspx?ID=2824), the mountaineer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to their Reflex save against bludgeoning damage and natural disasters. --- **Speed** 25 feet; arctic passage **Melee** pick +14 ([fatal d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=597)), **Damage** 1d6+10 piercing **Melee** hatchet +14 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=708)), **Damage** 1d6+10 slashing **Melee** fist +14 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+10 bludgeoning **Ranged** hatchet +13 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)), **Damage** 1d6+10 slashing **Arctic Passage** The mountaineer ignores [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453) caused by ice or snow. **Team Awareness** **Requirements** A creature is [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=96) by one or more of the mountaineer's allies but is [observed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=84) by the mountaineer; **Effect** The mountaineer [Points Out](/Actions.aspx?ID=2315) an enemy and makes a Strike against them. **Chasm Crossing** The mountaineer Strides twice and [Leaps](/Actions.aspx?ID=2298) up to 20 feet horizontally. **Quick Draw** The mountaineer Interacts to draw their hatchet or pick, then Strikes with the weapon.
name: Mountaineer

<title level="1" pfs="">[Tomb Raider](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3474)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

Great treasure awaits those willing to explore the hazardous depths of ancient tombs and forgotten dungeons. Some tomb raiders seek the riches of bygone eras; others recover pieces of history thought lost to the sands of time.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 20

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 15
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">

</column>

</row>

<title level="2" right="Creature 5">[Tomb Raider](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3474)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 56

**Perception** +13

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1)

**Skills**
[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +13, [Architecture Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +11, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +13, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) +7, [Engineering Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +11, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +9, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +11, [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=50) +13

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +3

**Dex** +4

**Con** +1

**Int** +2

**Wis** +2

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Hazard Spotter** Even if the tomb raider isn't [Searching](/Actions.aspx?ID=2630), they get a check to find traps that normally require them to be Searching.

**Items**
[Climbing Kit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=14), [Hand Crossbow](/Weapons.aspx?ID=69) (20 bolts), [Kukri](/Weapons.aspx?ID=56)

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 21 

**Fort** +10 

**Ref** +15 

**Will** +11 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 75

</row>

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet, climb 15 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
kukri +15 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)),
**Damage** 1d6+9 slashing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +15 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+9 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
hand crossbow +15 ([range increment 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)),
**Damage** 1d6+6 piercing

**Trick Attack** <actions string="Single Action" />  The tomb raider chooses one of their weapons. The next attack with that weapon this turn deals an additional 2d6 precision damage. In addition, the tomb raider can Interact to draw or reload the weapon.

</column>

<document level="2" id="creature-family-537" />
name: Tomb Raider

Gamekeepers know every beast that walks, slithers, flies, or swims in their territory and where to find them; try to keep up with the pack if you think you can. The land has chosen these people as guardians, giving them mysterious powers while in their territory. They are prepared to keep balance. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 22 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 20 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 17 [Gamekeeper](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3475) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 56 **Perception** +14 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +13, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +11, [Hunting Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +11, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +13, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +15, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +15 **Str** +3 **Dex** +4 **Con** +2 **Int** +0 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +1 **Move It!** The gamekeeper can [Hustle](/Actions.aspx?ID=2626) for 30 minutes longer and is not affected by [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453) while in their territory. **Items** [animal treats](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1705), _+1 [arbalest](/Weapons.aspx?ID=432)_ (40 bolts), [Club](/Weapons.aspx?ID=2) --- **AC** 23 **Fort** +17 **Ref** +13 **Will** +12 **HP** 95 **Sic 'Em!** ([auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) **Trigger** An [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=531) within 60 feet of the gamekeeper is killed; **Effect** The gamekeeper stokes the ire of the wild. Until the end of the gamekeeper's next turn, they and all animals in a 60-foot emanation gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and a +2 status bonus to damage rolls.
**Keeper's Revenge** ([curse](/Traits.aspx?ID=566), [primal](/Traits.aspx?ID=676)) When the gamekeeper dies, all creatures in a 60-foot emanation that have damaged the gamekeeper in the last minute must succeed a DC 24 Will saving throw or be cursed. All [animals](/Traits.aspx?ID=531) the cursed creature encounters have an initial attitude toward them that is one step worse. This curse can be removed only by an effect that specifically targets curses. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** club +15, **Damage** 1d6+9 bludgeoning **Melee** fist +15 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+9 bludgeoning **Ranged** _arbalest_ +17 ([backstabber 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=544), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [range increment 110 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)), **Damage** 1d10+6 piercing **Leader of the Pack** The gamekeeper depends on a small pack of dogs or other pack animals suitable for the environment to patrol their area. Creatures that are adjacent to a [hostile](/Conditions.aspx?ID=80) [animal](/Traits.aspx?ID=531) are considered [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) to the gamekeeper.
name: Gamekeeper

As is reflected in the many depictions of the elk-headed [Erastil](/Deities.aspx?ID=282), god of the hunt, the hunter is very much a creature of the forest, known by the forest and familiar with every aspect of it. After all, the final determination of who is the hunter and who is prey often depends on who can make an ally of the terrain. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 23 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 21 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18 [Hunter](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3476) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 57 **Perception** +17 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Forest Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +13, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +15, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +17, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +17, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +17 **Str** +4 **Dex** +4 **Con** +2 **Int** +1 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +0 **Expert Subsistence** While using [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) to [Subsist](/Actions.aspx?ID=2368), if the hunter rolls any result worse than a success, they get a success. On a success, they can provide subsistence living for themselves and sixteen additional creatures, and on a critical success, they can take care of twice as many creatures as on a success.
**Forest Walker** The hunter ignores the effects of [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453) in a forest environment. **Items** _+1 [composite longbow](/Weapons.aspx?ID=434)_, [Dagger](/Weapons.aspx?ID=3), [Leather Armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=4), [Shortsword](/Weapons.aspx?ID=43) --- **AC** 25 **Fort** +12 **Ref** +17 **Will** +15 **HP** 115 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** dagger +17 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+10 piercing **Melee** shortsword +17 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d6+10 piercing **Melee** fist +17 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+10 bludgeoning **Ranged** _composite longbow_ +18 ([deadly d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=570), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=677), [range increment 100 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254), [volley 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=730)), **Damage** 1d8+8 piercing **On the Hunt** ([Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561)) The hunter designates one creature they're observing or tracking as their prey. The hunter gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to [Seek](/Actions.aspx?ID=2301) the prey and to [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) checks to [Track](/Actions.aspx?ID=2408) the prey. The first time the hunter hits the designated prey in a round, they deal an additional 1d8 precision damage. These effects last until the hunter uses On the Hunt again.
name: Hunter

markdown:
When a giant, dangerous animal is found, there's always someone who tries to pet it. A woolly wrangler is usually accompanied by an [elephant](/Monsters.aspx?ID=2993) or [mammoth](/Monsters.aspx?ID=2994). They can [Command this Animal](/Actions.aspx?ID=2400) without needing to succeed at a [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) check. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 24 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 22 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 19 [Wooly Wrangler](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3477) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 57 **Perception** +16 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +14, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +14, [Mountain Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +18, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +16, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +18 **Str** +6 **Dex** +3 **Con** +4 **Int** +0 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +2 **In Balance** Whenever the woolly wrangler rolls a success on a [Recall Knowledge](/Actions.aspx?ID=2367) check using [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) or [Mountain Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41), they get a critical success instead. **Items** [animal treats](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1705), _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [greatclub](/Weapons.aspx?ID=377)_, [Leather Armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=4), [Whip](/Weapons.aspx?ID=48) --- **AC** 26 **Fort** +19 **Ref** +12 **Will** +16 **HP** 125 **Resistances** [cold](/Traits.aspx?ID=555) 10 **Uneven Footing** ([aura](/Traits.aspx?ID=542)) 10 feet. While the woolly wrangler is mounted on a Huge or Gargantuan creature, the ground near the mount shakes and buckles. Squares in the aura are [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453) for Medium or smaller creatures.
**[Reactive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=48)** --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _greatclub_ +20 ([Backswing](/Traits.aspx?ID=545), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Shove](/Traits.aspx?ID=694)), **Damage** 2d10+12 bludgeoning **Melee** whip +19 ([Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=577), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)), **Damage** 1d4+12 slashing **Melee** fist +19 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+12 bludgeoning **Wrangling Whip** The woolly wrangler makes a whip Strike. On a hit, the woolly wrangler can either knock the target [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=88) or [pull](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) it up to 5 feet. If the creature ends this movement adjacent to the wrangler's mount, the mount can make a melee unarmed Strike against the creature as a free action.
name: Wooly Wrangler

Full-scale expeditions require a central leader. Expedition leaders tend to have level heads in dangerous situations and can make decisions quickly when time is of the essence. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 26 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 24 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 21 [Expedition Leader](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3478) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 58 **Perception** +21 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Erutaki](/Languages.aspx?ID=54), [Skald](/Languages.aspx?ID=42), [Tien](/Languages.aspx?ID=43), [Varki](/Languages.aspx?ID=55) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +20, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +20, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +18, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +19, [Scouting Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +21, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +18 **Str** +4 **Dex** +2 **Con** +4 **Int** +2 **Wis** +3 **Cha** +0 **Familiarity with the Land** The expedition leader isn't affected by [severe weather](/Rules.aspx?ID=2814) and ignores [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453).
**On Guard** When the expedition leader [Scouts](/Actions.aspx?ID=2629), they grant their party a +2 circumstance bonus to their initiative rolls. **Items** [Compass](/Equipment.aspx?ID=16), [four-person tent](/Equipment.aspx?ID=57), _+1 [hide armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=44)_, [hooded lantern](/Equipment.aspx?ID=29), _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [machete](/Weapons.aspx?ID=516)_, [Repair Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2747), [Shortbow](/Weapons.aspx?ID=77) (20 arrows), [Spyglass](/Equipment.aspx?ID=54), [Sun Goggles](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3584), [Survey Map](/Equipment.aspx?ID=65) --- **AC** 27 **Fort** +21 **Ref** +18 **Will** +15 **HP** 160 **[Reactive Strike](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=48)**
**Memories of Expeditions Past** **Frequency** once per day; **Trigger** The expedition leader fails a [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) check; **Effect** The expedition leader rethinks their choices based on prior experience. The degree of success increases by one step, from critical failure to failure or from failure to success. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _machete_ +21 ([deadly d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=570), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Sweep](/Traits.aspx?ID=708)), **Damage** 2d6+10 slashing **Melee** fist +20 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+10 bludgeoning **Ranged** shortbow +19 ([deadly d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=570), [range increment 60 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 1d6+6 piercing **Quick Draw** The expedition leader Interacts to take out their machete or shortbow, then Strikes with the weapon. **Think Fast!** **Requirements** The expedition leader has a hand free; **Effect** The expedition leader scoops up a handful of rubble and throws it. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must succeed at a DC 27 Reflex save or be [dazzled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=65) and [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) until the start of the expedition leader's next turn.
name: Expedition Leader

markdown:
The apothecary skillfully combines materials into unguents and medicines using crushed herbs, curative minerals, and potent extracts. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 13 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 11 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 8 [Apothecary](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3479) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 60 **Perception** +5 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +5, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +10, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +8 **Str** +0 **Dex** +1 **Con** +1 **Int** +3 **Wis** +3 **Cha** +1 **Medical Specialist** For encounters involving making medicine or alchemical contests, the apothecary is a 3rd-level challenge.
**Medical Wisdom** The apothecary can identify the effect of any alchemical composition or medical ingredient using only their senses. This typically takes 1 minute. **Items** [lesser acid flask](/Equipment.aspx?ID=74) (2), [Dagger](/Weapons.aspx?ID=3), [minor elixir of life](/Equipment.aspx?ID=91) (2), [Healer's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727), leather apron (functions as [padded armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=40)), mortar and pestle --- **AC** 14 **Fort** +8 **Ref** +3 **Will** +5 +1 circumstance to all saves vs. [poisons](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) **HP** 8 **Resistances** [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) 2 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** stone pestle +4, **Damage** 1d6 bludgeoning **Melee** fist +5 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4 bludgeoning **Ranged** acid flask +5 ([range increment 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [Splash](/Traits.aspx?ID=699)), **Damage** 1 acid plus 1d6 [persistent acid](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and 1 [splash](/Traits.aspx?ID=699) acid

markdown:
The art of medicine is a blend of the intellectual and the practical, concerned with how diseases work and how to prevent them. The physician can be found consulting well-thumbed tomes while meticulously examining patients to better understand their condition, before determining the most effective treatment. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 13 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 11 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 8 [Physician](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3480) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 60 **Perception** +6; (8 to notice ailments) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +6, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +12, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +5 **Str** -1 **Dex** +1 **Con** +1 **Int** +4 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +2 **Medical Specialist** For medical matters, the physician is a 4th-level challenge.
**Bedside Manner** A physician has a +4 circumstance bonus to [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) checks to [Make an Impression](/Actions.aspx?ID=2392) on or make a [Request](/Actions.aspx?ID=2393) of a [diseased](/Traits.aspx?ID=578), [poisoned](/Traits.aspx?ID=669), or wounded creature.
**Doctor's Hand** When the physician rolls a critical failure on a check to [Treat Disease](/Actions.aspx?ID=2397), [Treat Poison](/Actions.aspx?ID=2398), or [Treat Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399), they get a failure instead. **Items** [minor elixir of life](/Equipment.aspx?ID=91) (2), [Healer's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727), medical textbook --- **AC** 13 **Fort** +9 **Ref** +3 **Will** +8 **HP** 8 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** fist +5 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4–1 bludgeoning **Ranged** medical textbook +5 ([Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)), **Damage** 1d4–1 bludgeoning
name: Physician

markdown:
Local herbalists use their understanding of the natural world to heal and restore balance. Most join a secret lodge that teaches these ancient arts. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 15 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 13 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 10 [Local Herbalist](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3481) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 60 **Perception** +7 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +6, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +4, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +7, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +7 **Str** +3 **Dex** +0 **Con** +1 **Int** +1 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +0 **Herbalism Specialist** For encounters involving collecting herbs or making medicine from them, the local herbalist is a 3rd-level challenge.
**Natural Medicine** The herbalist can use [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) instead of [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) to [Treat Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399) or [Administer First Aid](/Actions.aspx?ID=2396), and gains a +3 circumstance bonus to the check if they're in the wilderness with access to fresh herbal ingredients. **Items** cooking pot, medicine bag (functions as a [healer's toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727)), [Staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=12) --- **AC** 13 **Fort** +8 **Ref** +5 **Will** +9 **HP** 24 **Saving Touch** **Frequency** once per 10 minutes; **Trigger** An ally close enough for the herbalist to reach with a Stride is reduced to 0 Hit Points; **Effect** The herbalist Strides until adjacent to the allye and [Administers First Aid](/Actions.aspx?ID=2396) to that ally. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** staff +5 ([two-hand d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=718)), **Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning **Melee** fist +5 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning **Ranged** fungal spores +7 ([Fungus](/Traits.aspx?ID=614), [Poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669), [range increment 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)), **Damage** 1d4 poison plus 1d4 [persistent poison](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) **Prompt Poultice** ([Manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** The local herbalist quickly mixes together a potent healing salve with the most precious ingredients from their medicine bag. They create a temporary [lesser elixir of life](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3308). This elixir remains potent for 1 round before becoming sour and useless.
name: Local Herbalist

markdown:
The surgeon specializes in the physical alteration of the body to prevent the spread of disease, removing necrotic and decaying flesh to help the whole to survive. Few healers know the science of anatomy and physiology better. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 16 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 14 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 11 [Surgeon](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3482) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 61 **Perception** +14 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +10, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +8, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +16 **Str** +1 **Dex** +3 **Con** +1 **Int** +2 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +0 **Medical Specialist** In medical matters, a surgeon is a 6th-level challenge.
Doctor's Hand When the surgeon rolls a critical failure on a check to [Treat Disease](/Actions.aspx?ID=2397), [Treat Poison](/Actions.aspx?ID=2398), or [Treat Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399), they get a failure instead. **Items** bonesaw (functions as a [temple sword](/Weapons.aspx?ID=418)), [Healer's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727), scalpel (3. functions as a [dagger](/Weapons.aspx?ID=358)) --- **AC** 17 **Fort** +7 **Ref** +7 **Will** +10 **HP** 30 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** bonesaw +9 ([Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)), **Damage** 1d8+1 slashing **Melee** scalpel +11 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+1 piercing **Melee** fist +11 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+1 bludgeoning **Ranged** scalpel +11 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+1 piercing **Medical Malpractice** The surgeon attempts a [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) check against the Fortitude DC of one living creature they can see within 60 feet. On a success, the surgeon's melee Strikes deal an extra 1d6 precision damage against that creature (2d6 on a critical success) until 1 minute passes or the surgeon critically hits that creature, whichever comes first. Using this action again ends any previous one. A surgeon can target an individual creature no more than once per day with this ability.
name: Surgeon

This alchemist sells healing potables, but might offer their services without a fee to those truly in need. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 18 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 16 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 13 [Tonic Merchant](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3483) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 62 **Perception** +6 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +11, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +9, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +10, [Mercantile Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +9, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +9 **Str** +0 **Dex** +2 **Con** +1 **Int** +4 **Wis** +1 **Cha** +2 **Items** [moderate acid flask](/Equipment.aspx?ID=74) (×8), [Alchemist's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2702), [Dagger](/Weapons.aspx?ID=3), formula book, [Healer's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727) --- **AC** 17 **Fort** +10 **Ref** +9 **Will** +8 **HP** 50 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** dagger +10 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+4 piercing **Melee** fist +10 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+4 bludgeoning **Ranged** acid flask +10 ([Splash](/Traits.aspx?ID=699), [thrown 30 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)), **Damage** 2d6 [persistent acid damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) plus 2 acid [splash](/Traits.aspx?ID=699) damage **Ranged** dagger +10 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+4 piercing **Healing Bomb** ([Manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645)) The tonic merchant quickly crafts a [lesser antidote](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3296), [lesser antiplague](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3297), or [minor elixir of life](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3308) and lobs it at a willing or [unconscious](/Conditions.aspx?ID=95) ally within 30 feet. The elixir affects the ally as though they imbibed it.
The tonic merchant can use the rarest materials in their toolkit to improve the item to a moderate antidote, moderate antiplague, or lesser elixir of life. Afterward, they must spend 10 minutes gathering new ingredients before they can do so again.
name: Tonic Merchant

<title level="1" pfs="">[Plague Doctor](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3484)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

These healers, often seen wearing distinctive masks and burning powders to defend against airborne plagues, are as much feared as they are respected. To see a plague doctor signals that disease has infested the land—and that it might have already taken hold.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 20

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 15
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">

</column>

</row>

<row gap="medium">

**Cha** +2

+2 circumstance to all saves vs. [disease](/Traits.aspx?ID=578)
</row>

<row gap="medium">

</row>

</column>

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
staff +9 ([two-hand d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=718)),
**Damage** 1d4 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +10 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
crossbow +10 ([range increment 120 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)),
**Damage** 1d8 piercing

**Divine Prepared Spells** DC 23
- **Cantrips (3rd)**
[Guidance](/Spells.aspx?ID=1549), [Light](/Spells.aspx?ID=1585), [Message](/Spells.aspx?ID=1598), [Sigil](/Spells.aspx?ID=1673), [Stabilize](/Spells.aspx?ID=1689)
- **1st**
[Detect Poison](/Spells.aspx?ID=1486), [Cleanse Cuisine](/Spells.aspx?ID=1468) (×2)

[Healer's Blessing](/Spells.aspx?ID=1808)

**Healing Hands**   When the plague doctor casts [_heal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554), they roll d10s instead of d8s.

**Improved Communal Healing**   When the plague doctor casts [_heal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554) targeting a single creature, the plague doctor also restores Hit Points equal to the spell's level to themself or any other creature within range of the spell.

[Clear Mind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1469), [Soothe](/Spells.aspx?ID=1678), [Veil of Privacy](/Spells.aspx?ID=1739) (3 slots)
- **4th**
[Cleanse Affliction](/Spells.aspx?ID=1467), [Clear Mind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1469), [Soothe](/Spells.aspx?ID=1678) (3 slots)

**Bard Composition Spells** DC 25, 2 Focus Points
- **4th**
[Hymn of Healing](/Spells.aspx?ID=1768)

**Emotionally Invested**  ([Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [Healing](/Traits.aspx?ID=623), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) When the therapeutic healer casts a spell with the [healing](/Traits.aspx?ID=623) trait on a creature other than themself, the healer regains HP equal to the spell's rank.

**Therapeutic Care**   When [Treating Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399), the therapeutic healer can treat up to four targets. If they succeed at a DC 20 check to Treat Wounds, they can also reduce the value of one [clumsy](/Conditions.aspx?ID=61), [enfeebled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=71), or [stupefied](/Conditions.aspx?ID=94) condition affecting a single patient by 1. They can reduce a [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68) or [doomed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=67) condition instead if they succeed at a DC 30 check. This can't reduce permanent doomed conditions.

</column>

<title level="1" pfs="">[Humanitarian Hermit](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3486)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

Some druids look after those forgotten by society and thrive at the borders of civilization.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 26

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 24

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 21
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">

</column>

</row>

<title level="2" right="Creature 9">[Humanitarian Hermit](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3486)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 63

**Perception** +17

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Fey](/Languages.aspx?ID=119), [Wildsong](/Languages.aspx?ID=116)

**Skills**
[Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +19, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +14, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +21, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +19, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +14, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +17

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +4

**Dex** +1

**Con** +3

**Int** +1

**Wis** +4

**Cha** +1
</row>

Plant Empathy The humanitarian hermit can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) skill with [plants](/Traits.aspx?ID=668) and [fungus](/Traits.aspx?ID=614).

**Items**
[Hide Armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=7), [expanded healer's toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=59), [Primal Symbol](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2743), _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [staff of healing](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3042)_

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 26 

**Fort** +18 

**Ref** +16 

**Will** +19 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 150

</row>

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_staff_ +20 ([Parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=667), [Reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716), [two-hand d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=718)),
**Damage** 2d4+10 bludgeoning plus 2d8 vitality

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +19 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+10 bludgeoning

**Primal Prepared Spells** DC 27, attack +19
- **Cantrips (5th)**
[Electric Arc](/Spells.aspx?ID=1509), [Light](/Spells.aspx?ID=1585), [Know the Way](/Spells.aspx?ID=1582), [Stabilize](/Spells.aspx?ID=1689), [Vitality Lash](/Spells.aspx?ID=1744)
- **1st**
[Cleanse Cuisine](/Spells.aspx?ID=1468), [Create Water](/Spells.aspx?ID=1476), [Vanishing Tracks](/Spells.aspx?ID=1737)
- **2nd**
[Create Food](/Spells.aspx?ID=1475), [Environmental Endurance](/Spells.aspx?ID=1517), [Peaceful Rest](/Spells.aspx?ID=1625)
- **3rd**
[Earthbind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1506), [Haste](/Spells.aspx?ID=1553), [Safe Passage](/Spells.aspx?ID=1659)
- **4th**
[Cleanse Affliction](/Spells.aspx?ID=1467) (×2), [Mountain Resilience](/Spells.aspx?ID=1610)
- **5th**
[Heal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554) (×4), [Vital Beacon](/Spells.aspx?ID=1743)

**Rituals** DC 27

- **3rd**
[Reincarnate](/Rituals.aspx?ID=35)

**Cleansing Earth** <actions string="Three Actions" /> ([Plant](/Traits.aspx?ID=668), [Primal](/Traits.aspx?ID=676)) **Frequency** once per hour; **Effect** The humanitarian blesses the land and their allies. In a 30-foot emanation, plants grow and become [difficult terrain](/Rules.aspx?ID=453). Additionally, all allies in the emanation gain 20 temporary Hit Points and can ignore the difficult terrain. These effects last for 1 minute.

**Primal Staff**   A staff wielded by the humanitarian hermit gains the [parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=667), [reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), and [trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716) traits, and Strikes with it deal an additional 2d8 vitality damage.

**Steady Spellcasting**   If a reaction would [disrupt](/Rules.aspx?ID=2342) the humanitarian hermit's spellcasting action, the hermit attempts a DC 15 flat check. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

</column>

<aside>
<title level="2" noclass="true" icon="/images/Icons/Sidebar_4_RelatedCreatures.png">Reincarnation Transitions</title>

In cases of death from communal enacted injustice, [_reincarnate_](/Rituals.aspx?ID=152) can give the perished a renewed chance at life, free from the weight of their past and the trappings of their old society. The humanitarian hermit acts as a caretaker during this transition, helping the individual reach out to old friends for emotional healing and closure. If the hermit believes them to be a good candidate, they may help the reincarnated find a new life within their druidic order.
</aside>

<document level="2" id="creature-family-538" />
name: Humanitarian Hermit

Peerless healers are legendary, blending divine and natural medicine. Often pillars in their respective communities, they see to the health of the populace. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 34 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 32 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 29 [Peerless Healer](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3487) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 64 **Perception** +25 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1), [Empyrean](/Languages.aspx?ID=115) **Skills** [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +26, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +33, [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=43) +27, [Religion](/Skills.aspx?ID=46) +25, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +23 **Str** +3 **Dex** +1 **Con** +3 **Int** +2 **Wis** +4 **Cha** +5 Doctor's Hand When the peerless healer rolls a critical failure on a check to [Treat Disease](/Actions.aspx?ID=2397), [Treat Poison](/Actions.aspx?ID=2398), or [Treat Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399), they get a failure instead.
**Medical Specialist** The peerless healer is a 17th-level challenge for contests of medicine. **Items** _+1 [resilient](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2786) [breastplate](/Armor.aspx?ID=47)_, [expanded healer's toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2727), _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [greater staff of healing](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3042)_ --- **AC** 35 **Fort** +26 **Ref** +24 **Will** +27 +2 status vs. [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) and [disease](/Traits.aspx?ID=578) **HP** 200 **Resistances** [poison](/Traits.aspx?ID=669) 15 --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** _staff_ +25 ([two-handed d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=718)), **Damage** 2d4+9 bludgeoning plus 4d8 vitality **Melee** fist +24 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+9 bludgeoning plus 4d8 vitality **Divine Spontaneous Spells** DC 37, attack +29 - **Cantrips (5th)** [Detect Magic](/Spells.aspx?ID=1485), [Divine Lance](/Spells.aspx?ID=1498), [Message](/Spells.aspx?ID=1598), [Shield](/Spells.aspx?ID=1671), [Stabilize](/Spells.aspx?ID=1689) - **1st** [Air Bubble](/Spells.aspx?ID=1438), [Cleanse Cuisine](/Spells.aspx?ID=1468), [Create Water](/Spells.aspx?ID=1476), [Sanctuary](/Spells.aspx?ID=1660) (4 slots) - **2nd** [Everlight](/Spells.aspx?ID=1518), [Revealing Light](/Spells.aspx?ID=1653), [Share Life](/Spells.aspx?ID=1669), [Water Breathing](/Spells.aspx?ID=1755) (4 slots) - **3rd** [Heroism](/Spells.aspx?ID=1555), [Locate](/Spells.aspx?ID=1588), [Ring of Truth](/Spells.aspx?ID=1656), [Safe Passage](/Spells.aspx?ID=1659) (4 slots) - **4th** [Fly](/Spells.aspx?ID=1534), [Talking Corpse](/Spells.aspx?ID=1712), [Resist Energy](/Spells.aspx?ID=1651), [Unfettered Movement](/Spells.aspx?ID=1732) (4 slots) - **5th** [Creation](/Spells.aspx?ID=1477), [Locate](/Spells.aspx?ID=1588), [Sending](/Spells.aspx?ID=1665), [Truespeech](/Spells.aspx?ID=1728) (4 slots) - **6th** [Clear Mind](/Spells.aspx?ID=1469), [Field of Life](/Spells.aspx?ID=1526), [Sound Body](/Spells.aspx?ID=1679), [Sure Footing](/Spells.aspx?ID=1708) (4 slots) - **7th** [Breath of Life](/Spells.aspx?ID=1456), [Heal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554), [Regenerate](/Spells.aspx?ID=1648), [Vital Beacon](/Spells.aspx?ID=1743) (4 slots) - **8th** [Cleanse Affliction](/Spells.aspx?ID=1467), [Heal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554), [Moment of Renewal](/Spells.aspx?ID=1607) (3 slots) **Rituals (8th)** DC 37 - **5th** [Resurrect](/Rituals.aspx?ID=20) **Community Healer** When [Treating Disease](/Actions.aspx?ID=2397) or [Treating Wounds](/Actions.aspx?ID=2399), the humanitarian healer can treat up to eight targets. In addition, each time the peerless healer successfully Treats Wounds, they can also either reduce the value of one [clumsy](/Conditions.aspx?ID=61), [enfeebled](/Conditions.aspx?ID=71), [drained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=68), or [stupefied](/Conditions.aspx?ID=94) condition affecting a single patient by 2 or cast a 7th-rank [_clear mind_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1469), [_sound body_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1679), or [_sure footing_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1708) spell on one patient without expending a spell slot. **Healing Echo** ([Manipulate](/Traits.aspx?ID=645), [Vitality](/Traits.aspx?ID=509)) **Trigger** The peerless healer restores Hit Points to an ally using [_heal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554); **Effect** One willing creature within 30 feet who didn't benefit from the triggering spell regains Hit Points equal to half the healing granted. The peerless healer can't use Healing Echo again for 1d4 rounds. **Healing Hands** When the peerless healer casts [_heal_](/Spells.aspx?ID=1554), they roll d10s instead of d8s.

<title level="1" pfs="">[Servant](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3489)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

A servant might be a maid or butler, keeping a home in working order, or a server in an establishment like an inn, taking orders and serving customers.

<column gap="tiny">

([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 13

<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 66

**Perception** +7

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1)

**Skills**
[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +5, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +4, [Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +6, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +2

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +1

**Dex** +3

**Con** +1

**Int** +0

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +2
</row>

**Items**
cutlery, servant's uniform, serving platter

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 14 (15 with platter raised)

**Fort** +5 

**Ref** +7 

**Will** +3 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 7

</row>

**Quick Catch** <actions string="Reaction" /> **Trigger** An object the servant could hold in one hand is dropped within the servant's reach; **Requirements** The servant has at least one hand free; **Effect** The servant catches the dropped object before it hits the floor or leaves their reach.

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
cutlery +6 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)),
**Damage** 1d4+1 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +6 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+1 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
cutlery +6 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [thrown 15 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)),
**Damage** 1d4+1 piercing

**Protective Platter**   The servant can raise their serving platter using the [Raise a Shield](/Actions.aspx?ID=2316) action. The platter has the same statistics as a [buckler](/Shields.aspx?ID=17) but requires a hand to hold.

</column>

Upon landing, the crate breaks open in a 5-foot burst. Each creature in the area takes 2d6 bludgeoning damage with a DC 13 basic Reflex save, and the area is difficult terrain until cleared.

**Whistling** Drovers can whistle instead of speaking when communicating simple messages (such as “go left,” “split the herd,” and “danger ahead”) to other drovers or when using the [Command an Animal](/Actions.aspx?ID=2400) action on their herding dogs.

**Items**
lasso, overalls, [Signal Whistle](/Equipment.aspx?ID=50), [Sling](/Weapons.aspx?ID=72) (20 bullets), [Whip](/Weapons.aspx?ID=48)

**AC** 15 

**Fort** +6

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 18

</row>

</column>

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
whip +7 ([Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=577), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)),
**Damage** 1d4+3 slashing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +7 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+3 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
sling +6 ([Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=677), [range increment 50 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)),
**Damage** 1d6+1 piercing

**Hogtie** <actions string="Two Actions" />  **Requirements** A creature is grappled or [restrained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=90) by the drover's lasso; **Effect** The drover can pull the grappled creature up to 20 feet. Then, if the creature is within reach, the drover hogties it, attempting to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376) it again. On a success, the creature is restrained with the lasso, and the drover doesn't need to maintain the grapple. The hogtie lasts until the creature [Escapes](/Actions.aspx?ID=2296) or the lasso is [Forced Open](/Actions.aspx?ID=2375). The drover can Interact to free a hogtied creature within reach.

**Lasso** <actions string="Two Actions" />  The drover uses their lasso to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376) a Large or smaller creature up to 20 feet away. They can continue to Grapple to keep their hold on the target so long as the target remains within 20 feet and they continue to hold the end of the lasso. In addition to the [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=77) creature being able to [Escape](/Actions.aspx?ID=2296), a successful DC 16 [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) check to [Force Open](/Actions.aspx?ID=2375) can remove the lasso entirely.

</column>

<title level="1" pfs="">[Innkeeper](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3496)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

The sight of an inn is a welcome one to any weary traveler. Innkeepers can often be found cleaning the common room, overseeing the evening meal, or settling in new lodgers. Innkeepers keep an eye on their neighbors' doings and are often excellent sources of information.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 15

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 13

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 10
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">
<image src="/images/Monsters/Innkeeper.webp" />
</column>

</row>

<title level="2" right="Creature 1">[Innkeeper](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3496)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 69

**Perception** +7

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1)

**Skills**
[Accounting Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +5, [Alcohol Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +7, [Cooking Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +5, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) +6, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +6, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +7

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +2

**Dex** +0

**Con** +0

**Int** +2

**Wis** +2

**Cha** +3
</row>

**Font of Gossip** The innkeeper's business gives them insight into the neighborhood's happenings. A person can [Gather Information](/Actions.aspx?ID=2391) from an innkeeper in 30 minutes rather than canvassing an entire neighborhood. Each person can learn gossip from an innkeeper only once per day, and only if the innkeeper is [friendly](/Conditions.aspx?ID=75) or [helpful](/Conditions.aspx?ID=78) to that individual. Whatever information the innkeeper knows about a given topic doesn't change if someone else asks the innkeeper about that topic, unless the innkeeper has since learned more.

**Items**
broom (functions as a [staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=367)), innkeeper's apron (functions as [leather armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=41)), ledger, [pewter mug](/Equipment.aspx?ID=36)

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 14 

**Fort** +7 

**Ref** +3 

**Will** +9 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 20

</row>

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
broom +7 ([two-hand d8](/Traits.aspx?ID=718)),
**Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +7 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
pewter mug +5 ([thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)),
**Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning

**Home Base Brawler**   The innkeeper knows how to settle fights that break out. When the innkeeper is fighting in their establishment, their Strikes gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the attack roll, deal an additional 1d4 damage, and gain the [nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661) trait if they don't already have it. The innkeeper can choose not to gain this benefit.

**Innkeeper's Advice** <actions string="Three Actions" /> ([Auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [Fortune](/Traits.aspx?ID=612), [Linguistic](/Traits.aspx?ID=642), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) **Frequency** once per day; **Effect** The innkeeper gives some pertinent advice to a single creature other than themself. For 24 hours, when that creature fails a skill check or saving throw, they can recall this advice and reroll the check, using the second result instead. Once that creature uses this ability, its effect ends. A creature that receives the Innkeeper's Advice is temporarily immune to the ability for 1 month.

</column>

<document level="2" id="creature-family-539" />
name: Innkeeper

When a message, mail, or package needs to be delivered, messengers make deliveries—typically from large towns and cities or to other towns and cities. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 15 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 13 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 10 [Messenger](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3497) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 70 **Perception** +6 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +8, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +5, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +6, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +7, [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) +4 **Str** +0 **Dex** +3 **Con** +4 **Int** +0 **Wis** +1 **Cha** +1 **Don't Shoot the Messenger** Messengers get a +2 circumstance bonus to [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) checks to convince another creature not to blame them for any news they deliver.
**Road Runner** Messengers can use [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) in place of [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) to [Sense Direction](/Actions.aspx?ID=2406) when they're on a road. **Items** [Dagger](/Weapons.aspx?ID=3), satchel of mail, [Sling](/Weapons.aspx?ID=72) (10 bullets) --- **AC** 16 **Fort** +7 **Ref** +10 **Will** +4 **HP** 20 --- **Speed** 30 feet **Melee** dagger +8 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+2 piercing **Melee** fist +8 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning **Ranged** dagger +8 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711), [versatile S](/Traits.aspx?ID=724)), **Damage** 1d4+2 piercing **Ranged** sling +8 ([range increment 50 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [Propulsive](/Traits.aspx?ID=677)), **Damage** 1d6+2 bludgeoning **Express Messenger** Allies traveling with the messenger gain a +5-foot circumstance bonus to travel Speed, to a maximum of the messenger's travel Speed. If they use the [Hustle](/Actions.aspx?ID=2626) activity, they can Hustle for a minimum of 1 hour instead of the usual amount. **Special Delivery** The messenger Interacts to take an item of light Bulk or less held by a willing ally within reach, Strides, then delivers the item to a willing ally in reach at their new location.

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

A brilliant architect can contemplate wondrous structural marvels, but someone must pick up a hammer and make these dreams real. Construction workers are the backbone of any city's infrastructure.

<column gap="tiny">

**Languages**

**Skills**
[Architecture Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +15, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +10, [Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +13, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +6

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +4

**Dex** +0

**Con** +3

**Int** +2

**Wis** +1

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Specialty Contractor** For encounters involving architecture or construction, the construction worker is a 6th-level challenge.

**Items**
[Artisan's Toolkit](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2703), [bricks](/Equipment.aspx?ID=1776) (4), [Chalk](/Equipment.aspx?ID=12), safety gear (functions as [leather armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=41)), sledgehammer (functions as a [maul](/Weapons.aspx?ID=388))

</column>

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
brick +6 ([thrown 10 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)),
**Damage** 1d6+4 bludgeoning

**By Design**  ([Exploration](/Traits.aspx?ID=595)) The construction worker spends 1 minute inspecting the layout of a room and attempts a DC 22 [Architecture Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) check. On a success, they learn the size and layout of all adjacent rooms on the same floor (or all rooms on the floor on a critical success). They can inspect each room only once per day.

**Demolishing Swing** <actions string="Two Actions" />  The construction worker makes a maul Strike against a creature. If it hits, the creature is pushed 10 feet. If the target is wearing metal armor, its armor also takes the damage, which bypasses 5 of the armor's Hardness.

</column>

name: Construction Worker

Any Small or Medium creature that moves into the space with the trap triggers it and must attempt a DC 18 [basic](/Rules.aspx?ID=329) Reflex save. **Sneak Attack**   The vermin catcher deals 1d6 extra precision damage to [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) creatures.

<column gap="tiny">

---

<column gap="tiny">

<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +14 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d8+5 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
nunchaku +14 ([Backswing](/Traits.aspx?ID=545), [Disarm](/Traits.aspx?ID=577), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602)),
**Damage** 1d6+5 bludgeoning

<actions string="Single Action" />
shuriken +14 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)),
**Damage** 1d6+5 piercing

**Flying Attack** <actions string="Two Actions" />  The tournament combatant makes a [Leap](/Actions.aspx?ID=2298), [High Jump](/Actions.aspx?ID=2377), or [Long Jump](/Actions.aspx?ID=2378). At any point during the jump, if they're adjacent to an enemy, they can Strike that enemy with a fist or nunchaku Strike, even in midair. The combatant falls to the ground after the Strike. If the distance they fall is no more than the height of their jump, they land upright and take no damage.

**Somersault Attack** <actions string="Single Action" />  The tournament combatant attempts to [Tumble Through](/Actions.aspx?ID=2370) a target's space. If they succeed on their [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) check, the tournament combatant can make a fist or nunchaku Strike against that target while moving through its space.

**Powerful Fists**   The martial artist's fist Strikes don't take penalties when making lethal attacks.

**Work The Crowd** <actions string="Single Action" /> ([Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) **Frequency** once per 10 minutes; **Requirements** The combatant is within 50 feet of at least three spectators; **Effect** With a flashy flurry of moves, the tournament combatant elicits cheers. The tournament combatant is [quickened](/Conditions.aspx?ID=89) for 1 minute. They can use the extra action only to Strike or Stride.

</column>

name: Tournament Combatant

These fighters combine the takedowns of a wrestler with aggressive stances and unorthodox blows, ensuring that contenders won't know what hit them. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 23 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 21 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 18 [Mixed Martial Artist](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3502) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 73 **Perception** +15 **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +15, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +17, [Martial Arts Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +17 **Str** +4 **Dex** +2 **Con** +3 **Int** +1 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +1 **Items** _+1 [handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3086)_ --- **AC** 24 **Fort** +18 **Ref** +15 **Will** +12 **HP** 130 --- **Speed** 35 feet **Melee** fist +16 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d8+6 bludgeoning **Powerful Fists** The martial artist's fist Strikes don't take penalties when making lethal attacks. **Stance Shift** ([Stance](/Traits.aspx?ID=701)) The mixed martial artist enters a stance of their choice, gaining the listed circumstance bonus and Strike but losing the ability to make other Strikes.
  • **Elbow Knockout Stance** +2 to [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) checks to [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380) or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382); **Melee** cross elbow +16 ([nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382), [unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)) **Damage** 2d6+8 bludgeoning
  • **Secure Grapple Stance** +2 to Athletics checks to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376); **Melee** grappling limb + 16 ([grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376), [nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)) **Damage** 2d4+8 bludgeoning
  • **Thrashing Barrage Stance** +2 to damage against [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) opponents; **Melee** thrashing fist + 16 ([forceful](/Traits.aspx?ID=611), [nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)) **Damage** 2d8+8 bludgeoning
**Takedown Fluidity** **Trigger** The mixed martial artist's last action was a successful [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376), [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380), or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382). **Effect** The mixed martial artist uses Stance Shift.
name: Mixed Martial Artist

Beyond the black belt, there is the grandmaster. If a battle breaks out, this incredible warrior possesses unparalleled qi adeptness and punches that can kill. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 36 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 34 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 31 [Grandmaster](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3503) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 74 **Perception** +35; [lifesense](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=67) ([imprecise](/Rules.aspx?ID=412)) 60 feet **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +33, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +33, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +25, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +25, [Martial Arts Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +30, [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=42) +25, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +25 **Str** +6 **Dex** +4 **Con** +3 **Int** +1 **Wis** +5 **Cha** +1 **Items** _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [returning](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2845) [shuriken](/Weapons.aspx?ID=439)_, _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3086)_, _+2 [greater striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [temple sword](/Weapons.aspx?ID=418)_, _[bands of force](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3058)_ --- **AC** 40 **Fort** +28 **Ref** +32 **Will** +27 **HP** 310 --- **Speed** 50 feet **Melee** _temple sword_ +33 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)), **Damage** 3d8+14 slashing **Melee** _fist_ +33 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 3d6+14 bludgeoning **Ranged** _shuriken_ +31 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [reload 0](/Traits.aspx?ID=254), [thrown 20 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=711)), **Damage** 3d4+14 piercing **Monk Focus Spells** DC 38, attack +34, 3 Focus Points - **8th** [Harmonize Self](/Spells.aspx?ID=2064), [Qi Blast](/Spells.aspx?ID=2055), [Touch of Death](/Spells.aspx?ID=2058), [Wind Jump](/Spells.aspx?ID=2065) **Disrupt Qi** ([Void](/Traits.aspx?ID=510)) The grandmaster attempts an [unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719) Strike against a living creature. On a hit, the creature takes 3d6 [persistent void damage](/Conditions.aspx?ID=29) and is [enfeebled 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=71) until the persistent damage ends. **Flurry of Blows** **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** The grandmaster makes two fist Strikes. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. The grandmaster can substitute any number of the attacks with temple sword Strikes or attempts to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376), [Reposition](/Actions.aspx?ID=2379), [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380), or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382). **Forbidden Palm** **Requirements** The grandmaster has at least 1 Focus Point; **Effect** The grandmaster casts [_touch of death_](/Spells.aspx?ID=2058) (spending 1 Focus Point as normal). Any time the target attempts a Fortitude save against this touch of death, the grandmaster takes 40 damage and is permanently [enfeebled 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=71). If the target gets a critical success, it's [stunned 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=93); if it gets a success or failure the stunned condition it gains is increased by 1, and any damage it takes is increased by 40. **One-Millimeter Punch** The grandmaster makes a single, carefully controlled unarmed Strike that deals 2 additional dice of damage, or 4 additional dice if the grandmaster spent 3 actions. If this damages the target, the grandmaster can choose to make the target attempt a DC 38 Fortitude save.
**Critical Success** The target is unaffected.
**Success** The target is [pushed](/Rules.aspx?ID=451) back 5 feet.
**Failure** The target is pushed back 10 feet.
**Critical Failure** The target is pushed back 10 feet for each action the grandmaster spent on One-Millimeter Punch. **Powerful Fists** The grandmaster's fist Strikes don't take penalties when making lethal attacks, and the grandmaster's fist Strikes are treated as [adamantine](/Equipment.aspx?ID=374), [cold iron](/Equipment.aspx?ID=375), and [silver](/Equipment.aspx?ID=379).
name: Grandmaster

<title level="1" pfs="">[Black Belt](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3504)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

Many martial arts schools use colored belts to differentiate skill levels. Above all is the black belt, an advanced practitioner who can counter any attack.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 30

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 28

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 25
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">
<image src="/images/Monsters/Blackbelt.webp" />
</column>

</row>

<title level="2" right="Creature 12">[Black Belt](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3504)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 73

**Perception** +25

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1)

**Skills**
[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) +25, [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) +25, [Martial Arts Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +22, [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=48) +20

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +5

**Dex** +4

**Con** +3

**Int** +1

**Wis** +3

**Cha** +0
</row>

**Items**
_+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [handwraps of mighty blows](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3086)_, _+1 [striking](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2829) [bo staff](/Weapons.aspx?ID=372)_, _[bands of force](/Equipment.aspx?ID=3058)_

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 32 

**Fort** +23 

**Ref** +23 

**Will** +20 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 220

</row>

**Blocking Counterattack** <actions string="Reaction" /> **Trigger** A creature within the black belt's reach targets them with a melee attack **Effect** The black belt blocks, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to their AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, the black belt retaliates with a Strike. This Strike doesn't count toward the black belt's multiple attack penalty, and the multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 40 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_bo staff_ +25 ([Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Parry](/Traits.aspx?ID=667), [Reach](/Traits.aspx?ID=684), [Trip](/Traits.aspx?ID=716)),
**Damage** 2d8+9 bludgeoning

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
_fist_ +25 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Magical](/Traits.aspx?ID=644), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 2d8+9 bludgeoning

**Monk Focus Spells** DC 32, attack +23, 2 Focus Points
- **6th**
[Inner Upheaval](/Spells.aspx?ID=2053), [Qi Rush](/Spells.aspx?ID=2054)

**Flurry of Blows** <actions string="Single Action" />  **Frequency** once per round; **Effect** The black belt makes two fist Strikes. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. The black belt can substitute any number of the attacks with bo staff Strikes or attempts to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376), [Reposition](/Actions.aspx?ID=2379), [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380), or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382).

**Powerful Fists**   The martial artist's fist Strikes don't take penalties when making lethal attacks, and their fist Strikes are treated as [cold iron](/Rules.aspx?ID=375) and [silver](/Rules.aspx?ID=379).

**Rapid Barrage** <actions string="Two Actions" /> ([Incapacitation](/Traits.aspx?ID=631)) The black belt pummels their fists in a fast onslaught. They make three fist Strikes against one target. If more than one Strike hits, combine damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Regardless of whether any Strikes hit, the target must succeed at a DC 32 Fortitude save or be [clumsy 1](/Conditions.aspx?ID=61) until the end of their next turn and stunned 1 (clumsy 2 and [stunned 2](/Conditions.aspx?ID=93) on a critical failure).

</column>

<document level="2" id="creature-family-540" />
name: Black Belt

Fiery and heady, a political upstart actively pushes against the status quo. **[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)** ([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 14 **[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 12 **[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 9 [Political Upstart](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3505) **Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 76 **Perception** +8; (11 to [Sense Motive](/Actions.aspx?ID=2302)) **Languages** [Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1) **Skills** [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) +8, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +10, [Legal Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +11, [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=45) +10, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +11 **Str** +0 **Dex** +1 **Con** +0 **Int** +2 **Wis** +2 **Cha** +3 **Rhetoric Specialist** For social encounters involving debate and legal logic, the political upstart is a 3rd-level challenge. **Items** long coat (functions as [leather armor](/Armor.aspx?ID=41)), political pamphlets, [soapbox](/Equipment.aspx?ID=52), [Writing Set](/Equipment.aspx?ID=63) --- **AC** 14 **Fort** +4 **Ref** +7 **Will** +10 **HP** 15 **Retort** **Trigger** A creature fails a Charisma-based skill check against the political upstart; **Effect** The political upstart targets the creature with Fiery Rhetoric. --- **Speed** 25 feet **Melee** fist +5 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)), **Damage** 1d4 bludgeoning **Fiery Rhetoric** ([Auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [Linguistic](/Traits.aspx?ID=642), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) The upstart rattles off talking points at an enemy within 30 feet. The target takes a –2 status penalty to Perception and Will saves for 1 minute. **Fascinating Speech** ([Auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [Emotion](/Traits.aspx?ID=590), [Linguistic](/Traits.aspx?ID=642), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) The political upstart begins a rousing speech which they can Sustain up to 1 minute. Any creature within 30 feet that can hear the speech, must attempt a DC 17 Will save.
**Success** The creature is unaffected.
**Failure** The creature is [fascinated](/Conditions.aspx?ID=72) with the upstart for 1 round.
**Critical Failure** The creature is fascinated with the upstart as long as the speech lasts.
name: Political Upstart

<title level="1" pfs="">[Arms Dealer](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3506)</title>

<row gap="medium">

<column gap="medium" flex="1 1 400px">

A seedy arms dealer has access to all kinds of deadly weapons and can quickly provide them to clients in need… for the right price, of course.

<column gap="tiny">
**[Recall Knowledge - Humanoid](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**
([Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47)): DC 16

**[Unspecific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 14

**[Specific Lore](/Rules.aspx?ID=563)**: DC 11
</column>

</column>

<column gap="medium">
<image src="/images/Monsters/Arms_Dealer.webp" />
</column>

</row>

<title level="2" right="Creature 2">[Arms Dealer](/NPCs.aspx?ID=3506)</title>

<traits>
<trait label="Medium" />
<trait label="Human" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=627" />
<trait label="Humanoid" url="/Traits.aspx?ID=628" />
</traits>

<column gap="tiny">

**Source** [NPC Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=236) pg. 76

**Perception** +9; (11 to [Sense Motive](/Actions.aspx?ID=2302)) 

**Languages**
[Common](/Languages.aspx?ID=1)

**Skills**
[Crafting](/Skills.aspx?ID=37) +7, [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=38) +7, [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) +7, [Firearm Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +14, [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) +9, [Society](/Skills.aspx?ID=47) +9, [Underworld Lore](/Skills.aspx?ID=41) +9

<row gap="medium">
**Str** +0

**Dex** +3

**Con** +0

**Int** +1

**Wis** +3

**Cha** +3
</row>

**Arms Dealing Specialist** For encounters involving the purchase of weapons, the arms dealer is a 5th-level challenge.

**Items**
[Flintlock Musket](/Weapons.aspx?ID=521) (20 rounds), [Hand Cannon](/Weapons.aspx?ID=193) (20 rounds), [sword cane](/Equipment.aspx?ID=2772)

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

<row gap="medium">
**AC** 17 

**Fort** +6 

**Ref** +7 

**Will** +9 

</row>

<row gap="medium">
**HP** 28

</row>

**You Call That a Gun?** The arms dealer seems unaffected by your attempts to threaten them. The arms dealer gains a +2 circumstance bonus to their Will DC against [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) checks while they're holding a [firearm](/WeaponGroups.aspx?ID=16).

</column>

---

<column gap="tiny">

**Speed** 25 feet

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
sword cane +9 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Concealable](/Traits.aspx?ID=560), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602)),
**Damage** 1d6+2 piercing

**Melee**
<actions string="Single Action" />
fist +9 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+2 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
flintlock musket +11 ([Concussive](/Traits.aspx?ID=846), [fatal d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=597), [range increment 70 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)),
**Damage** 1d6+3 piercing

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
hand cannon +11 ([modular B](/Traits.aspx?ID=807), [or S; range increment 30 feet; reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=248)),
**Damage** 1d6+3 modular

**Take Stock** <actions string="Single Action" /> ([Auditory](/Traits.aspx?ID=541), [Concentrate](/Traits.aspx?ID=561), [Linguistic](/Traits.aspx?ID=642), [Mental](/Traits.aspx?ID=647)) The arms dealer advises an ally on how to properly use a firearm. The arms dealer chooses an ally within 30 feet wielding a firearm. That ally can use a reaction to Interact to reload their firearm.

</column>

<document level="2" id="creature-family-541" />
name: Arms Dealer

<row gap="medium">

**Melee**

fist +11 ([Agile](/Traits.aspx?ID=526), [Finesse](/Traits.aspx?ID=602), [Nonlethal](/Traits.aspx?ID=661), [Unarmed](/Traits.aspx?ID=719)),
**Damage** 1d4+5 bludgeoning

**Ranged**
<actions string="Single Action" />
flintlock musket +11 ([Concussive](/Traits.aspx?ID=846), [fatal d10](/Traits.aspx?ID=597), [range increment 70 feet](/Traits.aspx?ID=248), [reload 1](/Traits.aspx?ID=254)),
**Damage** 1d6+4 piercing

**Musketeer's Advance** <actions string="Two Actions" />  **Requirements** The musketeer is wielding a flintlock musket; **Effect** The musketeer makes a flintlock musket Strike. If the Strike hits, the target is [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) to melee attacks by the musketeer until the end of the musketeer's next turn. Regardless of whether the Strike hit, the musketeer then Interacts to swap their flintlock musket for their rapier and Strides toward the creature they attacked.

**One for All** <actions string="Single Action" />  **Requirements** The musketeer is wielding a single one-handed weapon in one hand and has their other hand free; **Effect** The musketeer grants a +1 circumstance bonus to AC to themself until the start of their next turn. Allies also gain this bonus while adjacent to the musketeer. If a creature would benefit from more than one creature's One for All ability, the bonus is +2 instead of +1.

**Sneak Attack**   The musketeer deals an extra 1d6 precision damage to [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) creatures.

</column>
